evals.prompt: 我想做一个 API 网关服务，供公司内部各个微服务使用。大概需要路由转发、认证鉴权、限流、日志。
evals.expected_output: A two-phase interaction: Phase 1 asks the user to confirm problem, scope, and assumptions (using structured Q&A formats); Phase 2 generates a design tree. A design file at docs/design-tree/<name>.md is created with all required sections. The file contains bilingual labels (e.g., 问题(problem), 范围(scope)). The design tree has at least 6 branches covering problem definition, scope, core objects, core flows, interfaces/data, decision points. Conversation output is concise: tree diagram + decision nodes + open branches + next step.

assertions.name: interactive_confirmation
assertions.description: Skill initiates interactive confirmation for problem, scope, and assumptions before generating the design tree — asking structured questions rather than outputting everything at once

assertions.name: design_file_created
assertions.description: A design file is created at docs/design-tree/<name>.md containing all required sections

assertions.name: bilingual_labels
assertions.description: Section headings use bilingual format: 问题(problem), 范围(scope), 设计树(design_tree), 开放分支(open_branches), 决策节点(decision_nodes), 假设(assumptions)

assertions.name: all_required_fields_in_file
assertions.description: Design file includes all six required fields: 问题(problem), 范围(scope), 假设(assumptions), 设计树(design_tree), 开放分支(open_branches), 决策节点(decision_nodes)

assertions.name: scope_has_non_goals
assertions.description: Scope section in the file explicitly lists non-goals or boundaries (不包含), not just what is included

assertions.name: decision_nodes_identified
assertions.description: At least one concrete decision node is identified (e.g., auth model, rate-limit algorithm, routing config format)

assertions.name: design_tree_has_branches
assertions.description: design_tree contains at least 5 named branches with brief descriptions; not just a flat list of features

assertions.name: tree_diagram_present
assertions.description: Output includes a character tree diagram inside a code block (no language tag) using ├── └── │ characters showing the design tree hierarchy

assertions.name: tree_diagram_status_markers
assertions.description: Tree diagram uses at least one status marker (e.g., [OPEN], [DECISION], [DRAFT]) to indicate branch state

assertions.name: conversation_output_concise
assertions.description: Conversation output does not repeat the full content of problem/scope/assumptions that were already confirmed and written to the file

evals.prompt: 帮我设计一个支持多租户的文件存储服务，用户可以上传、下载、分享文件，支持权限控制。需要能扛住大文件（单文件最大 5GB）。
evals.expected_output: Two-phase interaction producing a design file. Scope in the file contains explicit non-goals (e.g., no file editing, no virus scanning, no CDN). design_tree includes a non-functional requirements branch covering the 5GB constraint with notes on chunked upload and streaming. open_branches is not empty. assumptions records at least the scale or storage backend assumptions.

assertions.name: non_goals_explicit
assertions.description: Scope in the file includes explicit non-goals section (不包含), listing at least 2 things the system will NOT do

assertions.name: nfr_branch_present
assertions.description: design_tree includes a non-functional requirements (非功能需求) branch that addresses the 5GB constraint

assertions.name: assumptions_recorded
assertions.description: 假设(assumptions) section has at least 2 entries — the skill is not silently relying on unspoken premises

assertions.name: open_branches_not_empty
assertions.description: 开放分支(open_branches) is not empty — skill acknowledges what still needs refinement rather than claiming design is done

assertions.name: tree_diagram_for_large_design
assertions.description: Since this design has 3+ branches, output includes a character tree diagram inside a code block showing the hierarchy

assertions.name: bilingual_labels_consistent
assertions.description: All section headings in the file and conversation consistently use bilingual format (中文(english))

evals.prompt: 我们需要一个消息推送系统，支持 App 推送、短信、邮件三种渠道，消息有优先级，高优先级要保证送达。
evals.expected_output: Two-phase interaction producing a design file. decision_nodes includes at least one explicit architectural choice — likely around delivery guarantee strategy, channel fallback policy, or queue/broker selection. The design tree does not silently resolve these choices; it names them as decisions. The tree covers core flows including the high-priority delivery path. Decision nodes presented with structured format (table with star ratings recommended).

assertions.name: delivery_guarantee_as_decision
assertions.description: 决策节点(decision_nodes) includes at least one node related to delivery guarantee or retry strategy — this is a real architectural choice, not something to silently assume

assertions.name: core_flows_covered
assertions.description: design_tree includes a core flows (核心流程) branch that covers at minimum: message intake → routing → channel dispatch → delivery confirmation

assertions.name: no_premature_option_selection
assertions.description: Skill does not compare or select queue/broker implementations (Kafka vs SQS etc.) — that belongs to decision-evaluation, not structure

assertions.name: decision_format_structured
assertions.description: When presenting decision nodes to the user, skill uses a structured format (table with options, or at minimum numbered choices) rather than unstructured prose
